subcodes.first_line: In this day the Kingdom of God is illumined by the lights of the Sun of Manifestation, and the radiance of the Sun of Grace hath encompassed the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز ملکوت الهی بانوار شمس ظهور منور و پرتو آفتاب فضل عالم را احاطه نموده و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @Manifestation of God as sun, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @praise and encouragement
